title: Temples & Templates
description: Adding more boss encounters and tools to spice up your minecraft playthroughs!
body:
# New structures
This mod has a few new places to explore, such as a Desert Pyramid, a Mansion for rich villager families to live, and, perhaps, in the future, i will add a castle-like structure, containing giant stone guardians.
# New foods
The mod contains a few new foods, as well as some coming in the future. Right now, however, we have a few diffrent types of grapes, and strawberries.
# New tools
A few new sets of armour and tools are also included, such as copper tools, which are currently unfinished, as well as silver tools and armour (however, unlike most sets of tools and amour in this mod, they are crafted "traditionally", through familiar crafting recipies), skulk armour, which gives you the blindness effect as well as a few permanent positive buffs.
# A little magic!
Within the mod, it's possible to craft and use a few different staffs with different abilities! I'll include the crafting recipes of all the staffs on this page to hopefully make you understand them, and what they do.

https://imgur.com/a/0xTwgAu

# In Beta
The mod currently isn't finished, i will try my hardest to give you the complete version shortly!
# Boss items
Each finished boss currently in the mod has a custom, uncraftable, but really powerful weapon for you to use to take down other powerfull enemies, such as a sword that makes your enemies fall deep underground, probably dying of fall damage in the process.
# Mob textures taken from:

https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/5629843389/mummy

https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/5700516188258304/shadow-archer

https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/2806853045/dark-mage

https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/5701903539/demon-lord

https://minecraft.novaskin.me/post/989543036/guardian-of-the-knight

# Really important!
This mod contains items such as wine, however, I do not wish to promote exessive drinking of alcohol in real life, please do not take it that way!
